metadata.title: FinanceCalc Hub - Free Financial Calculators
metadata.description: Free financial calculators for mortgage, loans, investments, savings, and debt payoff. Make smarter money decisions with accurate tools.

hero.title: SMART CALCULATORS FOR SMARTER MONEY
hero.subtitle: Accurate, fast, and completely free. Plan your mortgage, crush your debt, grow your investments — all in one place.

trust.countries: USED IN BRAZIL • USA • PORTUGAL • +40 COUNTRIES

tools.title: Financial Calculators
tools.subtitle: Pick a calculator and get instant, accurate results.
tools.mortgageDesc: Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and view your full amortization schedule.
tools.personalLoanDesc: Find out your monthly payment and total interest cost for personal loans.
tools.creditCardDesc: See how long it takes to pay off your credit card debt and how much interest you can save.
tools.compoundInterestDesc: Calculate how your investments grow over time with the power of compound interest.
tools.savingsGoalDesc: Find out exactly how much you need to save each month to reach your financial goal.
tools.debtPayoffDesc: Compare Snowball vs Avalanche methods and find the fastest way to become debt-free.
tools.investmentReturnDesc: Calculate the real annual growth rate (CAGR) of your investments over time.
tools.affordabilityDesc: Discover how much house or loan you can realistically afford based on your income.

ctaFinal.title: READY TO MAKE SMARTER FINANCIAL DECISIONS?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Start now. 100% free. No BS.

common.disclaimer: This calculator provides estimates for informational purposes only. Consult a financial advisor before making decisions.

savingsGoal.title: Savings Goal Calculator
savingsGoal.description: Calculate how long it will take to reach your savings goal or how much you need to save each month.
